description: 로그 보존기간을 고려한 외부시스템연계설정 애플리케이션 참조
대상유형코드와 대상ID로 식별하는 일반 감사대상 애플리케이션 참조

check_expression: (ACNT_STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE' AND INACTIVE_RSN_CD IS NULL AND INACTIVE_DTM IS NULL) OR (ACNT_STATUS_CD = 'INACTIVE' AND INACTIVE_RSN_CD IS NOT NULL AND INACTIVE_DTM IS NOT NULL)
description: 계정상태와 비활성 원인 및 일시 일관성 검사

check_expression: (PWD_INIT_REQ_YN = 'Y' AND TEMP_PWD_EXPIRE_DTM IS NOT NULL AND TEMP_PWD_EXPIRE_DTM > PWD_CHG_DTM) OR (PWD_INIT_REQ_YN = 'N' AND TEMP_PWD_EXPIRE_DTM IS NULL)
description: 최초 등록 필요 여부와 임시 비밀번호 만료일시 일관성 검사

check_expression: (PAGE_INQ_CNT IS NULL OR PAGE_INQ_CNT > 0) AND (MAX_CALL_CNT IS NULL OR MAX_CALL_CNT > 0) AND (CONN_TIMEOUT_SEC IS NULL OR CONN_TIMEOUT_SEC > 0) AND (RSP_TIMEOUT_SEC IS NULL OR RSP_TIMEOUT_SEC > 0) AND (MAX_RETRY_CNT IS NULL OR MAX_RETRY_CNT >= 0)
CALL_END_DTM IS NULL OR CALL_START_DTM IS NULL OR CALL_END_DTM >= CALL_START_DTM
description: API 호출 시작과 종료 일시 순서 검사

check_expression: (SUCC_YN = 'Y' AND FAIL_RSN_CD IS NULL) OR (SUCC_YN = 'N' AND FAIL_RSN_CD IS NOT NULL)
(LOGOUT_DTM IS NULL AND LOGOUT_TYPE_CD IS NULL) OR (SUCC_YN = 'Y' AND LOGOUT_DTM IS NOT NULL AND LOGOUT_TYPE_CD IS NOT NULL)
(TGT_TYPE_CD IS NULL AND TGT_ID IS NULL) OR (TGT_TYPE_CD IS NOT NULL AND TGT_ID IS NOT NULL)
